title: Refactor network container options for podman 4.0
body:
Signed-off-by: Jankowiak Szymon-PRFJ46 <szymon.jankowiak@motorolasolutions.com>

As some networking options are no longer a thing, they were still in podman-py 4.0.
Definitely there are more of them but so far I've encountered these.
Those removed are in podman 3.4 but not in 4.0.
Option added is a new option in 4.0.
For reference please check : 
3.4 - https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/_static/api.html?version=v3.4#operation/ContainerCreateLibpod
latest - https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/_static/api.html#operation/ContainerCreateLibpod

After changes : 
```
>>> import podman
>>> client = podman.PodmanClient(base_url='unix:///run/podman/podman.sock')
>>> networks = {
...     "somenetwork": {
...          "aliases": ["test-alias"]
...     }
... }
>>> c1 = client.containers.create(name='test', image='test_image', command=['/bin/sleep', '12345'], networks=networks)
>>> print(c1.attrs["NetworkSettings"]["Networks"])
{'somenetwork': {'EndpointID': '', 'Gateway': '', 'IPAddress': '', 'IPPrefixLen': 0, 'IPv6Gateway': '', 'GlobalIPv6Address': '', 'GlobalIPv6PrefixLen': 0, 'MacAddress': '', 'NetworkID': 'somenetwork', 'DriverOpts': None, 'IPAMConfig': None, 'Links': None, 'Aliases': ['test-alias', 'd0239b151a21']}}
>>>
```

comments.body: @jwhonce I'm wondering what I can do about failed validation. If I understand it correctly it has problem with my commit message being too long. But it was already pushed and I'm not sure whether I'm allowed to force push to change commit message? Should I ignore it or can I fix it somehow ?

@msisj If I understand correctly:

```sh
git commit --amend
```
Edit commit...
```sh
git push origin HEAD --force
```
`origin` above is my remote repository on github. Github will update the PR automatically.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **NOT APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *msisj* To complete the [pull request process](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process), please ask for approval from **jwhonce** after the PR has been reviewed. The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman-py).
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - **[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman-py/blob/main/OWNERS)** Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
@jwhonce Yeah, I know, I was just hesitant whether I can (and should) use force push in this repository. I've updated the PR and now checks are all green so I guess that worked properly
